name: Token Footer Injector
description: Automatically appends a cumulative token-usage footer to outbound agent messages. Tracks session totals (turns, in/out tokens, cache %). The model does not write the footer; the plugin reads the real `usage` object from the llm_output hook. 100% hit-rate, 0 model tokens.

newSessionThreshold.description: Context usage percentage (0-100) above which a ⚠️ /new recommendation is shown. Default 70.

cumulative.description: When true (default), footer shows session-cumulative totals. When false, shows per-turn stats only.

modelContextWindows.description: Map of model id → context-window size in tokens. Supports exact match and prefix match. Takes priority over host config.

defaultContextWindow.description: Fallback context-window size when the model is not found anywhere. Default 128000.

skipAgents.description: Agent IDs to skip. No footer is appended for these agents.

maxMessageLength.description: If set, the final content (original + footer) is hard-capped at this length. The body is trimmed first; the footer is always preserved. Useful for Discord (2000). Default: no cap.

usageTtlMs.description: How long a stashed usage entry is kept before it is considered stale and dropped. Default 60000 (60s).

debug.description: When true, emits `[token-footer-injector]` log lines on every hook fire. Default false.
